per_problem.nl: There are two blocks, A and B, both sitting on the table. The goal is to stack block A on top of block B.
per_problem.generated_pddl:
(define (problem bw-p1-2blocks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:objects a b)
  (:init (ontable a) (ontable b) (clear a) (clear b) (handempty))
  (:goal (and (on a b)))
)

per_problem.nl: There are three blocks A, B, and C, all on the table. Build a tower where C is on top of B, and B is on top of A.
per_problem.generated_pddl:
(define (problem bw-p2-3tower)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:objects a b c)
  (:init (ontable a) (ontable b) (ontable c) (clear a) (clear b) (clear c) (handempty))
  (:goal (and (on c b) (on b a) (ontable a)))
)

per_problem.nl: Block A is on top of block B, and block B is on top of block C, with C sitting on the table. Rearrange the blocks so that C is on top of B, and B is on top of A.
per_problem.generated_pddl:
(define (problem bw-p3-reverse3)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:objects a b c)
  (:init (on a b) (on b c) (ontable c) (clear a) (handempty))
  (:goal (and (on c b) (on b a) (ontable a)))
)

per_problem.nl: Blocks A, B, C, and D are all on the table. Stack them into a single tower: D on top of C, C on top of B, B on top of A, with A remaining on the table.
per_problem.generated_pddl:
(define (problem bw-p4-4tower)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:objects a b c d)
  (:init (ontable a) (ontable b) (ontable c) (ontable d)
         (clear a) (clear b) (clear c) (clear d) (handempty))
  (:goal (and (on d c) (on c b) (on b a) (ontable a)))
)

per_problem.nl: Block A is currently stacked on top of block B, which is on the table. Swap them so that B ends up on top of A.
per_problem.generated_pddl:
(define (problem bw-p5-swap)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:objects a b)
  (:init (on a b) (ontable b) (clear a) (handempty))
  (:goal (and (on b a) (ontable a)))
)

per_problem.nl: There are five blocks: A, B, C, D, and E, all sitting on the table. Stack them into a tower with E on top of D, D on top of C, C on top of B, and B on top of A.
per_problem.generated_pddl:
(define (problem bw-p6-5tower)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:objects a b c d e)
  (:init (ontable a) (ontable b) (ontable c) (ontable d) (ontable e)
         (clear a) (clear b) (clear c) (clear d) (clear e) (handempty))
  (:goal (and (on e d) (on d c) (on c b) (on b a) (ontable a)))
)
